items.title: To be clear, the kind of *work* I do is far from boring and I want people to engage with…
items.title_zh: 需要明确的是，我所做的那种“工作”一点也不无聊，我希望人们参与……
items.description: To be clear, the kind of *work* I do is far from boring and I want people to engage with it because I think it's both difficult and important. The work is definitely top tier in terms of interestingness.
items.description_zh: 需要明确的是，我所做的“工作”一点也不无聊，我希望人们参与其中，因为我认为这既困难又重要。这部作品的趣味性绝对是顶级的。

items.title: It's also weird because why are you even writing about me in the first place?

items.description: It's also weird because why are you even writing about me in the first place? I'm very boring. I think I should be the millionth item on people's list of things to write internet fiction about. Somewhere below paper cups and the right way…

items.description: I've increasingly seen content written about me that's asserted very confidently but is also completely made up. We all know it's cheap to bullshit on the internet but it's weird to experience it first hand. Anyway, I just hope internet fi…
items.description_zh: 我越来越多地看到关于我的内容，这些内容非常自信，但也完全是捏造的。我们都知道在互联网上胡说八道很便宜，但亲身体验却很奇怪。无论如何，我只是希望互联网能够...

items.title: Claude Security is now in public beta, built into Claude Code on the web.
items.title_zh: Claude Security 现已进入公开测试版，内置于网络上的 Claude Code 中。
items.description: Claude Security is now in public beta, built into Claude Code on the web. Point it at a repo, get validated vulnerability findings, and fix them in the same place you're already writing code https://t.co/cutYJAhfpq
items.description_zh: Claude Security 现已进入公开测试版，内置于网络上的 Claude Code 中。将其指向存储库，获取经过验证的漏洞发现，并在您已经编写代码的同一位置修复它们 https://t.co/cutYJAhfpq

items.title: We treat Replit, inc as customer number zero of Replit.
items.title_zh: 我们将 Replit, inc 视为 Replit 的零号客户。
items.description: We treat Replit, inc as customer number zero of Replit. It goes beyond mere "dogfooding." We expect our usage to have insane ROI. This is an example: https://t.co/ZGNbIVoJ2a
items.description_zh: 我们将 Replit, inc 视为 Replit 的零号客户。它不仅仅是“dogfooding”。我们期望我们的使用能够带来疯狂的投资回报率。这是一个示例：https://t.co/ZGNbIVoJ2a
